/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/third_person_shooter.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/third_person_shooter.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/third_person_shooter.dir/engine/core/Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/third_person_shooter.dir/engine/graphics/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/third_person_shooter.dir/engine/input/InputManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/third_person_shooter.dir/engine/optimization/Profiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/third_person_shooter.dir/engine/physics/Physics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/third_person_shooter.dir/game/enemies/Enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/third_person_shooter.dir/game/player/Player.cpp.o -o third_person_shooter
